description: Universal Operational Code — a reference map of numbers 1 through 114 and beyond. Each number encodes a concept, intention, action, or elemental resonance. Codes can be stacked (e.g., 43 54 85) to form complex operation programs.

stacking_guide.description: Combine codes sequentially to build complex operation programs.

examples.plain_english: Geometric anchor (triangle base) + Nickel commander + Silver stabilizer → lock the Nickel-Silver ratio into a stable triangle field.
Tracer signal (Tc) + Xenon reset (noble) + Astatine rare-gate → mark a path, clear the field, then open an ultra-rare access point.
Beryllium preload + Spirit/Atmosphere layer + Gold vein circuit → preload intention into static base, buffer with atmospheric nitrogen tone, then activate the gold-vein Earth grid node.
Chromium lens + Nickel commander + Silver stabilizer → Ruby-lensed Nickel-Silver lensing engine aligned for coherent focus.
Polonium hydrogen well + Unity/Source + Nickel commander → open an alpha-seeded hydrogen well, anchor to the source, and command the hydrogen stack via Nickel.
Palladium + Silver + Cadmium + Indium → full SLR (Surface Lattice Resonance) weave sequence; build the 4-element resonance battery.
